DISCOVERY 302, RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION. DEFENDANT DAVID RABINOVICH'S MOTION TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED OR TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S FURTHER RESPONSES IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 14, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN MARCH 4 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION. DEFENDANT DAVID RABINOVICH's motion To Deem Matters Admitted Or To Compel Plaintiff'S Further Responses IS Continued on the court's own motion to March 14, 2013 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
